system:
You are a professional translator. Translate the user's text into clear, faithful English. Preserve technical terms, part numbers, SKUs, dates, and amounts verbatim. Return strict JSON: {"translated_text": str, "source_language": str, "notes": str|null}.

KEYSIGHT TRANSLATION KB — apply these rules:
  • Formatting: Reformat number grouping per locale (1.000,00 in DE/ES, 1,000.00 in EN). Do NOT convert currency unless explicitly requested.
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight Technologies
  • Preserve verbatim: SOA
  • Preserve verbatim: PO
  • Preserve verbatim: Q2O
  • Preserve verbatim: SSD
  • Preserve verbatim: WO
  • Preserve verbatim: ECCN
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR99
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR
  • Preserve verbatim: ITAR
  • Preserve verbatim: A2LA
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 17025
  • Preserve verbatim: Z540.3
  • Preserve verbatim: ANSI/NCSL
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-461
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-810
  • Preserve verbatim: AS9100
  • Preserve verbatim: IATF 16949
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 26262
  • Preserve verbatim: BERT
  • Preserve verbatim: VNA
  • Preserve verbatim: DSO
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(PO|Q|QT|QUOTE|SO|WO|INV|CCC|CC|CR)-[A-Z0-9-]+\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]\\d{4,5}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]{2,4}\\d{2,4}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bN\\d{4}[A-Z]?(-\\d+[A-Z]?)?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bM\\d{4}[A-Z]\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(MXA|EXA|UXA|UXR|FieldFox|InfiniiVision|Truevolt|Trueform|Streamline)\\b
  • Tone: Use formal business register. Spanish: usted form. Japanese: keigo (敬語). German: Sie form. French: vous form.
user:
SOURCE_LANGUAGE_HINT: es
TEXT:
Estimado equipo de Compras de Meridian Comunicaciones SA:

Gracias por enviar la orden de compra PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116 correspondiente a la cotización QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO. Confirmamos la recepción de los siguientes detalles:

- Número de PO: PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116
- Cotización de referencia: QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO
- Fecha de envío solicitada: 2026-06-04
- Condiciones de pago: Net 60
- Importe total indicado: 370.200,00

Líneas recibidas:
1. M9384B-04F — VXG Vector Signal Generator, 44 GHz, 2 canales (cant. 1)
2. N9040B-550 — UXA Signal Analyzer, 50 GHz, 510 MHz BW (cant. 1)
3. CAL-A2LA-1Y — Servicio de Calibración A2LA/ISO 17025, 1 año (cant. 1)
4. 85052D — Kit de Calibración Economy 3,5 mm, DC a 26,5 GHz (cant. 1)

Hemos identificado la variación que ustedes señalaron: el kit de calibración 85052D no figuraba en la cotización original. Por este motivo, la conversión de cotización a pedido se ha puesto en revisión interna para validar el precio de esa línea adicional antes de confirmar el pedido. Nuestro equipo de SalesOps se pondrá en contacto con ustedes para confirmar si la línea puede incluirse al precio indicado o si será necesario emitir un PO revisado.

Acusamos recibo dentro del plazo de 2 días hábiles solicitado. Una vez resuelta la validación de precio, les enviaremos la confirmación formal del pedido con el número de orden de venta y las fechas comprometidas.

Quedamos atentos a cualquier consulta.

Atentamente,
Keysight SalesOps

Return JSON only.

{"translated_text":"Dear Meridian Comunicaciones SA Purchasing Team:

Thank you for sending purchase order PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116 corresponding to quotation QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO. We confirm receipt of the following details:

- PO number: PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116
- Reference quotation: QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO
- Requested ship date: 2026-06-04
- Payment terms: Net 60
- Total amount indicated: 370,200.00

Lines received:
1. M9384B-04F — VXG Vector Signal Generator, 44 GHz, 2 channels (qty. 1)
2. N9040B-550 — UXA Signal Analyzer, 50 GHz, 510 MHz BW (qty. 1)
3. CAL-A2LA-1Y — A2LA/ISO 17025 Calibration Service, 1 year (qty. 1)
4. 85052D — Economy Calibration Kit 3.5 mm, DC to 26.5 GHz (qty. 1)

We have identified the variance you noted: the 85052D calibration kit was not included in the original quotation. For this reason, the quote-to-order conversion has been placed under internal review to validate the price of that additional line before confirming the order. Our SalesOps team will contact you to confirm whether the line can be included at the indicated price or whether it will be necessary to issue a revised PO.

We acknowledge receipt within the requested 2-business-day timeframe. Once the price validation is resolved, we will send you the formal order confirmation with the sales order number and the committed dates.

We remain available for any questions.

Sincerely,
Keysight SalesOps","source_language":"es","notes":""}

parsed.translated_text:
Dear Meridian Comunicaciones SA Purchasing Team:

Thank you for sending purchase order PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116 corresponding to quotation QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO. We confirm receipt of the following details:

- PO number: PO-MERID-COMM-077-Q2O-73116
- Reference quotation: QT-MERID-COMM-077-DEMO
- Requested ship date: 2026-06-04
- Payment terms: Net 60
- Total amount indicated: 370,200.00

Lines received:
1. M9384B-04F — VXG Vector Signal Generator, 44 GHz, 2 channels (qty. 1)
2. N9040B-550 — UXA Signal Analyzer, 50 GHz, 510 MHz BW (qty. 1)
3. CAL-A2LA-1Y — A2LA/ISO 17025 Calibration Service, 1 year (qty. 1)
4. 85052D — Economy Calibration Kit 3.5 mm, DC to 26.5 GHz (qty. 1)

We have identified the variance you noted: the 85052D calibration kit was not included in the original quotation. For this reason, the quote-to-order conversion has been placed under internal review to validate the price of that additional line before confirming the order. Our SalesOps team will contact you to confirm whether the line can be included at the indicated price or whether it will be necessary to issue a revised PO.

We acknowledge receipt within the requested 2-business-day timeframe. Once the price validation is resolved, we will send you the formal order confirmation with the sales order number and the committed dates.

We remain available for any questions.

Sincerely,
Keysight SalesOps
